title: pulmonaria tuberosa subsp. longifolia
intro: Pulmonaria tuberosa subsp. longifolia, also known as Lungwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant effects, making it a potential treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Pulmonaria tuberosa subsp. longifolia include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce congestion, and promote the healing of wounds and ulcers. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
